item.title: AgentBar 0.2.0
item.description:
### Settings, rebuilt - Brand-new settings window with searchable settings - Profile picker with per-account settings - New dropdown background options - New daily spend heatmap in Settings > Usage
### API-equivalent cost card - New cost card showing local Claude Code usage at pay-as-you-go API rates
### Menu bar dropdown - Account switcher chips for multi-profile setups - Rearrange widgets and hide widgets you don't use - Plan-tier badge with plan-switch markers on the usage charts - Refreshed menu bar color palette with custom colors
### Fixes and internals - Fixed a flicker when hovering over usage bars - Optimized size of history DB with tiered retention
